name: GATX Corporation
description: GATX Corporation is a leading global railcar lessor, operating one of the largest railcar fleets in the world. The company leases, operates, manages, and markets long-lived, widely used assets, primarily in the rail market. GATX provides high-quality railcars and related services to customers in various industries, including chemical, petroleum, food, agriculture, and transportation. Additionally, GATX owns and manages a fleet of commercial aircraft spare engines and has joint venture investments in liquefied gas carrying vessels.
